question_text: What is the definition of power in physics?

options.label: A
options.text: The amount of energy transferred per unit time

options.label: B
options.text: The total amount of energy in a system

options.label: C
options.text: The speed at which an object is moving

options.label: D
options.text: The force applied to an object over a distance

explanation: Power measures how quickly energy is being transferred or used. It is defined as the energy transferred divided by the time taken. The other options describe different physics concepts like total energy, velocity, and work.
